title: Ashen Emissive Ores
description: Adds glowing ore textures for Ashen 16x.
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

___
Do you like seeing ores glowing in the dark? Disappointed that other Glowing Ores resource packs don't work with Ashen 16x? Well, this Add-On is for you! This pack makes all Overworld and Nether ores (including Ancient Debris) glow for easy visibility.

This add-on **requires** Optifine, Continuity, or another equivalent in order to function!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
